text:
Here is SUPERYOSHI's explanation(Not mine):

I did not come up with the term Youtube Poop, nor was it MrSimon. The first one to publically use "Youtube Poop" in the title and tags was DukeofFortuneMan, a real-life friend of Yamino's, whose account has since been banned. It is also he who first used the two animated Zelda CD-i games in his videos in late 2006. Tetsuo9999 was the first to use Hotel Mario under the title "Luigi's frightening new fetish"

it's been debated whether or not me or Yamino truly came up with the title of "Youtube Poop" since neither of us saved our AIM conversations back then. We'd always call Youtube Youpoop because of our immature senses of humor and say we were "submitting some poop to Youtube", but we never used "Youtube Poop" to label and organize the videos. Neither I or Yamino have ever used it in our videos because we feel it detracts from the whole confusing experience.

In any case, it's indeed true that MrSimon popularized the term (As well as the videos in general), but his videos were not the first ones labeled as such. Unfortunatley, as I've stated before, after getting banned, DukeofFortuneMan has no interest in making a new account to upload the old videos, so all you have are my word and a few people who have reuploaded some of his videos they managed to back up. I don't think the very first one to use CD-i Zelda has ever been reuploaded.

Oh, and while we're on the subject of origins, it was Retrojape, a real-life friend of mine, who first used Mama Luigi back in October of 2005 under the name "Super Jario Bros.", which has since been uploaded on his account. Me and him made a handful of Mama Luigi videos back in 2005, but never published them on the internet until April of 2006 (All of mine are on my account, I don't believe he ever uploaded all of his).
